executives.name: James Dimon
executives.background: Mr. Dimon has been Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer since December 2005 and President since 2004. He was President and Chief Operating Officer from 2004 to 2005. He was Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Bank One Corporation from 2000 to 2004.

executives.name: Jeremy Barnum
executives.background: Mr. Barnum has been Chief Financial Officer since May 2021. He previously served as Head of Global Research for the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2021 to 2021 and as Chief Financial Officer of the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2013 to 2021.

executives.name: Daniel Pinto
executives.background: Mr. Pinto has been President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2022. He was Co-President and Co-Chief Operating Officer from 2018 to 2021 and CEO of the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2014 to 2024.

executives.name: Mary Erdoes
executives.background: Ms. Erdoes has been CEO of Asset & Wealth Management since 2009. She joined the firm in 1996 and has held various senior roles in the asset management business.

executives.name: Marianne Lake
executives.background: Ms. Lake has been CEO of Consumer & Community Banking since 2024. She was Co-CEO of Consumer & Community Banking from 2021 to 2024 and CEO of Consumer Lending from 2019 to 2021. She served as CFO of the firm from 2013 to 2019.

executives.name: Jennifer Piepszak
executives.background: Ms. Piepszak has been Co-CEO of the Commercial & Investment Bank since 2024. She was Co-CEO of Consumer & Community Banking from 2021 to 2024 and CFO of the firm from 2019 to 2021.

board_of_directors.name: Linda Bammann
board_of_directors.background: Retired Deputy Head of Risk Management at JPMorgan Chase. Former Vice Chair of Bank One Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Burke
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of NBCUniversal and former COO of Comcast Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Todd Combs
board_of_directors.background: Investment Officer at Berkshire Hathaway Inc. and CEO of GEICO.

board_of_directors.name: Alicia Boler Davis
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Alto Pharmacy. Former Senior Vice President of Global Customer Fulfillment at Amazon.

board_of_directors.name: Mellody Hobson
board_of_directors.background: Co-CEO and President of Ariel Investments, LLC. Chair of Starbucks Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Neal
board_of_directors.background: Retired Vice Chairman of General Electric Company and former Chairman and CEO of GE Capital.

board_of_directors.name: Phebe Novakovic
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of General Dynamics Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Virginia Rometty
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of IBM.
